changes.description: Created new phase file implementing bidirectional BFS from focal nodes over CALLS/IMPORTS/EXTENDS/USES_TYPE edges. Returns files ranked by min distance with connected_symbols.
Added prioritize_files(focal_symbols, max_files) method that resolves symbol names to node IDs via search, delegates to rank_by_proximity(), truncates results.
Rewrote prioritize_context() to accept focal_symbols and max_files, use BFS proximity instead of connection counting, return {path, distance, reason} format with focal_symbols_resolved.
